titleStmt.title: SII 26.471: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 471. (A.R. No. 448 of 1909.) MAṆAPPAḌAIVĪḌU, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the same maṇḍapa.

p.hi: Tribhº Vīrapāṇḍya: Year 2+21, Āḍi 27 = C. 1448 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places and is incomplete at the end.

It records a grant of 25 mā of land as dēvadāna for worship, offerings and procession to the god Mūṉṟīśvaramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Ambalattāḍinallūr alias Maṇaṟpaḍaivīḍu, in the north-eastern quarter of Śrīvallavaṉmaṅgalam,

a Brahmadēśam in Kīḻkaḷak-kūṟṟam, and 5 mā of land as maḍappuṟam to [Āgamaśīladēvar] alias [Umaiyōrupāga] Mudaliyār of the lineage of the Bhikshāmaḍa. Owing to the incomplete nature of the record, other details like the donor, etc., are not available.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī komāṟuparmmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu
Iraṇṭāvatiṉ Etir Irupattoṉṟāvatu Āṭi mātam Irupatteḻāntiyati kiḻkaḷakkūṟṟattu brahmatecam
śrīvallavaṉmaṅkalattu vaṭakiḻ piṭākai Ampalattāṭinallūr Āṉa maṇaṟpaṭaiviṭṭil Uṭaiyār muṉṟiśvaramuṭai
ya nāyaṉār koyilil devakaṉmikaḷukku Inta nāyaṉārkku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi tirupparivaṭṭam tirumālai tirunantāviḷakku
Uṭpaṭṭa nittiya niyamaṅkaḷukkum cīvali Eḻuntaruḷuvikkavum tevatāṉamāka Irupatañcu mā nilam pikṣāmaṭa santati Ākama
tevatāṉa Iṟai mutaliyāṟku maṭappuṟamāka Añcu mā nilam Āka muppatu mā nilamum kiḻkaḷakkūṟṟattu brahmadeya
koṇṭāṉ nārāyaṇap pereriyile viṭṭa vukku Ittevatāṉam nilam I ñcu māvukku coti cuntarapā
ṇṭiyaṉ vāykkālukku meṟku paḷḷikkoṇṭāṉ peruvatikku meṟkku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu kiḻakku niṉṟum ṭiṉeṟu nilam mukkāṇi varai
ttāṇ ṉ Āṟumākāṇiyum Uṭciṟuvāykkālukku meṟku taṭi Oṉṟu nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyiṉ Eḻumāvarai nāyiṉār cuvāmi tevar
Iṟaiyilikku meṟkku taṭi Oṉṟu nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ Araiye mākāṇiyum meṟku taṭi Oṉṟu nilam kāṇi Araikāṇi munti
rikaiyiṉ Araiye mākāṇiyum Uṭciṟuvāykkālukku meṟku taṭioṉṟu mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ mākāṇi nāyiṉār polintu na�
ṉa tiruviṭaiyāṭṭattukku meṟku taṭi Oṉṟu nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Uṭciṟuvāykkālukku meṟku taṭi Oṉṟu nilam mukkāṇi
Araikkāṇiyiṉ Araikkālum meṟku taṭi Oṉṟu nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ kālum meṟku taṭi Oṉṟu nilam Araimāviṉ kālum
Āka Ituvum Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟu meṟku niṉṟum taṭi Oṉṟu nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyiṉ Araiye mākāṇi Añcāntarattil �ti pukku
nilam taṭi Oṉṟu nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ Araiyum kiḻakku taṭi Oṉṟu nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyiṉ Aṟumākkāṇi nāyiṉār va
tevatāṉa Iṟaiyilikku kiḻakku taṭi Oṉṟu nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyil mākāṇiyum kiḻakku taṭi Oṉṟu nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyil Arai
yum Uṭciṟuvāykkālukku kiḻakku taṭi Oṉṟu nilam mukkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ mukkāl nāyiṉār polintuniṉṟapirāṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭattukku kiḻakku taṭi O
ṉṟu nilam mukkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ mukkāle mākāṇiyum kiḻakku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyiṉ mākāṇiyum muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟu kiḻakku
niṉṟum taṭi Oṉṟu nilam mukkāṇiyum meṟku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇiyiṉ mākāṇiyum meṟku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyiṉ Araikkā
lum kālukku meṟku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyiṉ mūṉṟu mā mukkāṇiyum meṟku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikai nāyiṉā
r polintuniṉṟapirāṉ tiruvuṭaiāṭṭattukkum vāykkālukkum meṟku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyiṉ mukkālum meṟku taṭi Oṉṟu nilam muk
kāṇi Araikkāṇiyiṉ kālum meṟku taṭi Oṉṟu nilam Araimāviṉ mukkālum nālāṅkaṇṇāṟu meṟku niṉṟum taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam Araimā Araikkāṇi
muntirikaiyiṉ Eḻumāvaraiyum kalu kiḻakku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇiyiṉ Araiye mākāṇi nāyiṉār poli niṉṟa ṉa tiruvuṭaivaṭṭattu
kkum kiḻakku taṭi Oṉṟu nilam Araimāvaraikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ Eḻumāvarai nāyiṉār cuvāmi tevatāṉa Iṟai Ilikkum vaṭameṟkku Oṉṟu nilamu
Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ Eṭṭumā mukkāṇiyum Uṭciṟuvāykkālukku Itaṉ kiḻakku taṭi Oṉṟu nilam mukkāṇi Arai
kkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ Arai nāyiṉār cuvāmi tevar Iṟai Ilikku kiḻakku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyiṉ ka
lum kālukku kiḻakku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ Araiyum kiḻakku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇiyiṉ Araiyum kiḻakku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇiyiṉ Eḻumā
muntirikaiyiṉ Araiyum Añcāṅ kaṇṇāṟu kiḻakku niṉṟum taṭi Oṉṟu nilam mukkāṇiyiṉ Eṭṭu mā mukkāṇiyum meṟku taṭi Oṉṟu nilam kāṇi A
raiyum meṟku taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam mukkāṇiyiṉ mākāṇi nāyiṉār cuvāmi tevartāṉa Iṟai Ilikkum kālukkum vaṭameṟku taṭi Oṉṟu nilam kāṇi Ā
Digital edition of SII 26.471 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
